context: Tests whether the agent handles MusicKit chart and library-write APIs accurately while preserving MediaPlayer and sibling-skill boundaries.

checklist.name: Chart initializer
checklist.description: Uses or recommends MusicCatalogChartsRequest(genre:kinds:types:) with an explicit genre argument such as nil.

checklist.name: Authorization before writes
checklist.description: Checks MusicAuthorization.currentStatus or requests authorization before library mutations.

checklist.name: Cloud library gate
checklist.description: Checks MusicSubscription.current.hasCloudLibraryEnabled before adding songs, albums, or playlist entries to the user's library.

checklist.name: Now Playing scope
checklist.description: Explains that ApplicationMusicPlayer handles Now Playing metadata automatically for Apple Music content and keeps manual MPNowPlayingInfoCenter updates for custom audio or explicit MediaPlayer handling.

checklist.name: Sibling boundary
checklist.description: Does not broaden the answer into unrelated AVKit, CarPlay, or app-wide audio architecture advice.
